global_rules: Every executed gate must update PLANS.md, the canonical gate map, the active leaves ledger, and the active execution log together.
No later gate may treat the rich workbook as direct runtime authority unless typed config/contracts are promoted in that gate or a later one.
The co-resident lane must not be renamed as `1.1`, `step_8`, or an eighth stage.
Gate 159 must resolve workbook lineage before later gates rely on a single workbook authority path.
Gate 164 is complete and the pack is now closed through Gate 164 on the work branch; no later gate may start until a new planning pack is explicitly routed.
Every operator handoff requires a fresh full-history zip from the exact green branch state.

The new pack rationale is grounded in repo artefacts only.

LEAF-G157-001.packaging_requirement: Fresh full-history zip required at operator handoff after every executed gate; the final audit gate must emit the pack closeout zip.

Write how that filter prevents the lane from drowning in every real-but-irrelevant dependency on every pass.
Record what remains out of scope until later packs can justify more concrete dependency logic.

Do not make every true franchise fact a live lane input all day.
Do not let the dependency filter become vague hand-waving.
